arts.ttl: Paul Pogba doping ban 'reduced to 18 months': When can Juventus man play again?
arts.sum: Juventus midfielder Paul Pogba's doping ban is reportedly reduced from four years to 18 months, meaning that the Frenchman can return to action in March 2025.

arts.ttl: Paul Pogba's drug ban REDUCED to 18 months
arts.sum: Paul Pogba ’s four-year drug ban has reportedly been reduced to 18 months, with the ex-France international set to return to competitive action in 2025. The 31-year-old tested positive for dehydroepiandrosterone (DHEA) - a banned substance that can raise testosterone levels - after Juventus ’ win over Udinese in August 2023.
